data.name: Fake World: Alien Demolition!
data.description_full:
Welcome to Fake World: Alien Demolition!, the explosive destruction game where alien invaders have transformed world cities with bizarre structures and fake landmarks. Your mission is simple: place your dynamite wisely, trigger the blast, and bring total demolition to every strange building in your way.

Get ready for a satisfying 3D city smash experience filled with destruction, strategy, and physics-based chaos. Analyze the structure, find weak points, and create an effective collapse. Rotate the 3D camera, plan your attack, and place dynamite from different angles to maximize damage. Then hit detonate and enjoy the spectacular fall of walls, floors, towers, and entire buildings!

This fast, fun, and addictive building destruction adventure makes each mission feel engaging and rewarding. From industrial plants to alien towers, every level offers a different target.If you enjoy destroying building games, smash city games, explode games, and offline building games, this experience is designed for you.

Travel across world cities under alien occupation and clear them one by one.Each country contains different destruction challenges. Use powerful boosters to increase the chaos: launch a missile, fire a laser, or call in Air Support for three powerful bombs in a row. With limited dynamite, the smartest move creates a powerful explosion.

Swipe to rotate, tap to place dynamite, and watch each structure collapse with realistic gravity. Play offline anytime, jump into events, earn rewards, and become the ultimate demolisher. Help cities get rid of bizarre illegal buildings one demolition at a time! In this bomb-filled TNT challenge, every tower becomes part of the war against the UFO threat, where each blast tests your demolition skills and turns every building into a destruction puzzle.Game from the Creators of Fake Island and City Demolish.

Key Features:
Global City Demolition:
Destroy alien structures in famous world cities and clear corrupted skylines one explosive mission at a time.

Strategic Dynamite Placement:
Place dynamite from multiple angles, target weak spots, and create an effective chain reaction for total destruction.

Powerful Boosters:
Use missile, laser, and air support boosters to break through difficult structures and improve your destruction strategy.

Physics-Based Gameplay:
Enjoy satisfying collapses, realistic gravity, and explosive results that make every building fall feel rewarding.

Offline Fun Anytime:
Play without internet and enjoy nonstop city smash action wherever you are.

Different Challenges in Every Level:
Demolish towers, factories, monuments, and strange alien buildings with varied layouts and unique weak points.

Events and Rewards:
Join special events, complete exciting missions, earn coins, and keep expanding your destruction journey.

FEATURES
● Enjoy the full demolition experience with no pay-to-win tactics.
● Can be played offline.
● Explore varied levels, boosters, and events in a demolition-focused experience.
● Feature-rich game with numerous elements.
● Test your strategy skills by finding weak points and planning each blast.
● Relaxing and satisfying gameplay.
● Destroy famous buildings and tear down the rooms.
● Variety of iconic buildings
● Fun for all ages: A game for family and friends gatherings!
● Keep your mind engaged with every demolition challenge.
● A great exercise for the brain.
● Smash rooms and destroy buildings.
● Simple and highly addictive gameplay.
● Play without the internet.
● Play offline.

➤This offline demolition game challenges your brain with strategic destruction! Place dynamites, trigger massive explosions, and tear down alien structures invading real-world cities.

➤Follow us on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and YouTube for updates and more fun games.

data.name: CrisisX
data.description_full:
A deadly mysterious virus outbreak wiped out most of the population within a few days, and the unknown infection continues to spread. People fled in chaos into the streets, only to realize that their homes had transformed into a post-apocalyptic wasteland, with toxic mutants and zombies roaming the city. Infrastructure is destroyed, and society and civilization have completely collapsed. Families were separated when fleeing into the wilderness.
Now, in this devastating doomsday, you are on your own! "SURVIVE" is the only thing that matters. How much longer can you make it out there?

▶ The world is yours to discover! ◀
Embark on your unknown adventure by creating a realistic self-avatar and exploring every inch of a unique, wide-open world with one of the largest maps ever developed. Raid cities, bunkers, and other locations teeming with terrifying walking dead, or explore freezing cold forests in the highlands. The game mechanics restore realistic geographic and climate conditions in North America, enabling you to experience different environments, landscapes, weather, and time zones. Confront numerous unexpected and serious tasks in a life after the end of the world, and build yourself a last shelter in this fallen continent!

▶ New order & rules must be established! ◀
Survival of the fittest! Test your survival skills by finding food and water, and collecting essential but rare materials left from the civilized world. Scavenge resources through activities like cutting trees, mining, hunting, gathering, and fishing to gain enough leverage for surviving the last days and perhaps establishing yourself as the most powerful among the last survivors. After all, only the strongest will endure in the light of day!

▶ Knives out, fight or fight! ◀
Exterminate crowds of mutated zombies and shoot down threatening monsters of all kinds. Each infected individual has a different appearance and attacking pattern depending on its mutation routes. As the last survivor, observe and employ a wise strategy to eliminate and escape the state of decay!
Your most formidable enemies are other surviving human players! Do not blindly venture into the dead; instead, grip your weapon tightly, be vigilant, and keep your eyes open for other survivalists passing by, whether engaging in a 1vs1 battle or an alliance battle. The distinction between a loyal friend and a dangerous intruder is often a fine line.

▶ Together, we thrive! ◀
Gain a foothold first by constructing yourself a shelter and exploiting resources through activities like taming horses, building, planting, and breeding. Ally with other survivors, restore a community, and expand in this zombie apocalypse. Fight side by side with your fellow survivors to resist enemy attacks. Only together can we survive in the last days on Earth!

▶ Uncover the mystery behind the end of the world! ◀
On this action packed journey of survival, you’ll be facing different tasks, puzzles and riddles. Solve them to expose the truth of the shattered world and save the dying light of the civilization. Perhaps the destruction of the fallen humanity was not an accident! You may also find more clues to trace your family’s whereabouts!
CRISIS X is YOUR LAST CHANCE OF SURVIVAL!

PLEASE NOTE
Network connection is required.
CrisisX is free to download and play. Some in-app items can also be purchased for real money. In-app purchases can be disabled through your device’s settings.

By downloading this app, you agree to our privacy policy and terms of use.

data.name: Playful Sort
data.description_full:
Welcome to a sparkling little world of cozy puzzles and gem art. Sort sparkling gems by color, clear the shelf, and watch beautiful pixel art masterpieces appear piece by piece — like a sparkling diamond painting brought to life, one tap at a time. The kind of game you can sink into for five minutes or an hour — a calm, satisfying break that gently keeps your mind active.

SORT GEMS & DIAMONDS, REVEAL PIXEL ART
Tap a color on the shelf, place the group on the board, and watch hidden pictures slowly come to life. Sort sparkling gems and diamonds by color to reveal a brand-new pixel art image every level — cute critters, sweet treats, dreamy landscapes, and more.

RELAXING YET CHALLENGING
Easy to pick up, satisfying to master. Early levels are calm and breezy; later ones gently test your strategy and patience. Always rewarding, never stressful — perfect for unwinding after a long day.

HANDY HELPERS
Stuck on a tricky board? Three boosters have you covered: • Broom — sweep the shelf clean • Magic Frame — auto-sort a whole region • Magnet — pull stray gems straight into place

HUNDREDS OF PICTURES TO COLLECT
Discover a growing gallery of dazzling gem art and diamond art pictures, with new themes added regularly. Stitch small levels together to reveal one giant masterpiece — every stage tells a bigger story.

YOUR PLAYFUL COMPANIONS
Three Gem characters keep you company throughout the game — Sunshine guides you through your daily tasks, Moss is there for chill moments, and Ember cheers your toughest wins. Charming friends that make every play session feel a little warmer.

PLAY ANYWHERE, ANYTIME No Wi-Fi?
No problem. Pause, resume, and play at your own pace, wherever you are. Five-minute break, long evening unwind, or your last cozy moment before bed — Playful Sort is ready when you are.

Sort. Sparkle. Reveal. Download Playful Sort today and start creating.

data.name: Wizard World: Harry's Mystery
data.description_full:
The owl came at midnight. Your magic adventure begins in Wizard World: Harry's Mystery.

You're a first-year at an ancient school of magic. Classes during the day, mischief after dark, and a castle full of things you're not supposed to touch.

A SCHOOL FULL MYSTERIES AND PUZZLES
Wizard World: Harry's Mystery is a magic adventure built as a playground, not a homework list. Wander the corridors. Sneak into rooms you weren't invited to. Cast spells and watch what happens. Try every door – most of them open.

CAST SPELLS ON EVERYTHING
Your spellbook grows as you learn. Combat dragon magic when you need it, mischief when you don't. Lift a classmate off the ground. Set a chandelier swinging. Solve magic puzzles by combining spells the way your professors definitely wouldn't approve of. The whole magic world reacts to your wand – find all secrets!

EXPLORE AN ENCHANTED CASTLE AND VILLAGE
Walk through the enchanted village outside the school gates. Climb towers in the enchanted castle. Open chests. Step into the forest and see what lives there. The map is hand-built and full of corners worth checking – not endless, just dense.

FLY A BROOM. RACE A BROOM. CRASH A BROOM.
Pick up a flying broom and go. Free flight over the castle at sunset. Broom racing tournaments against rivals. Custom brooms with real stats – speed, control, handling. The faster the broom, the harder the landings.

YOUR WAND, YOUR STYLE
Craft a wand from rare materials. Tune its stats – some wands are made for power, some for precision. Style your character. Find robes that fit who you want to be.

MAGICAL CREATURES IN THE WILD
Magical creatures roam the forests and fields around the school. Some are friendly. Some really aren't. Each one has its own behaviour worth figuring out.

WHAT'S IN Wizard World: Harry's Mystery
- Magic adventure set inside a school of magic
- Flying broom freeplay and broom racing
- Cast spells freely on enemies, objects, and the world itself
- Explore an enchanted castle, an enchanted village, and the forests beyond
- Wand customization with real stat tuning
- Character customization – style, robes, your own look
- Magic puzzles solved by spells
- Dozens of spells across different schools of magic
- Magical creatures to discover

WHO IS Wizard World: Harry's Mystery FOR?
If you grew up wishing the letter would come – it just did. Fans of magic adventure games, witch games, magic school stories, and anyone who just wants to cast spells at things will find their home here.

Your magic adventure starts now.

data.name: Kingdom Fall: Zombie Defense
data.description_full:
The kingdom that stood for centuries has fallen within weeks. A mysterious plague swept through the land, turning the dead into mindless monsters that devour everything in their path. Castles lie in ruins, villages are abandoned, and the few survivors who remain have lost all hope. But you refuse to surrender.

As a brave Lord leading a band of desperate survivors, you must rebuild from the ashes, recruit legendary heroes, and defend your stronghold against endless waves of undead that hunger for the living. In this dark age where betrayal and desperation reign, your courage and tactical brilliance will determine whether your people see another sunrise.

Kingdom Fall is a game of valor, strategy, and resilience. Every choice shapes your kingdom's destiny and your legacy as a leader. Will you focus on fortifying your castle walls and training elite defenders, or will you venture into the cursed lands to reclaim lost territories and uncover the source of the plague? The dead are rising, darkness spreads across the realm, and your people look to you for salvation! Do you have what it takes to restore the kingdom's glory?

GAME FEATURES

Rescue and Shelter Survivors: Venture beyond your walls to rescue survivors trapped in overrun villages and abandoned outposts. Bring them to your settlement, where they will pledge their loyalty and help rebuild the fallen kingdom.

Build Your Medieval Stronghold: Construct and upgrade castles, barracks, farms, and defensive structures to create an impregnable fortress. Manage resources wisely and transform your humble refuge into a thriving kingdom.

Recruit Powerful Heroes: Summon valiant knights, cunning rogues, powerful mages, and skilled archers to fight under your banner. Promote and equip them with legendary weapons and armor to lead your armies to victory.

Defend Against the Undead Hordes: Fortify your defenses with towers and elite guards. Command your forces in tactical battles against relentless zombie sieges that grow stronger with each passing night.

Forge Mighty Alliances: Unite with Lords from across the realm to form powerful alliances. Coordinate strategies, share resources, and wage epic wars against rival factions competing for control of the shattered kingdom.

SPECIAL NOTES
· This game includes random-item purchases.
· Network connection is required.
· Privacy Policy: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/
· Terms of Use: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/terms_of_use
data.description_short: The Kingdom Has Fallen. Rise as the Last Lord Standing.

Become a real woodsman in Lumberjack Simulator 3D — a realistic first person logging simulator where you cut trees, process timber and build your own forest industry from the ground up.

Chop trees with realistic axe mechanics and experience immersive wood cutting gameplay. Shape the notch, control tree felling and process timber step by step. Remove branches, cut logs, transport materials and turn raw wood into valuable products.

Carry logs by hand, load transport and move timber through the forest. Restore an abandoned pickup truck, repair it and use it to haul logs across rough terrain. Load the cargo bed, drive through forest roads and expand your production faster. The pickup also features visual damage mechanics for a more immersive offroad experience.

Build and expand your sawmill piece by piece. Unlock machines, processing stations and industrial equipment. Debark logs, process timber, create boards and transform raw resources into finished products.

Use conveyors, transport systems and forestry equipment to improve efficiency. Unlock new tools, vehicles and production methods as your logging camp grows into a complete timber industry.

🌿 Branch removal and tree cleanup
🏭 Timber industry progression

Cut trees. Process timber. Build your forest industry.

Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter also features exciting gameplay modes including jeep mode and helicopter mode. In jeep mode, players travel across rugged safari terrains while chasing moving targets. The jeep missions in Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter create fast paced action where timing and accuracy are essential. Helicopter mode provides aerial hunting gameplay where players aim from above and track animals and dinosaurs across massive open environments.

Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter offers multiple sniper rifles and modern weapons with upgrade systems for damage, zoom, reload speed, and stability. Unlock new sniper weapons and improve your shooting performance as you progress through Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter. The environments in Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter are designed for immersive gameplay and realistic exploration. Explore foggy forests, green jungles, safari grasslands, snowy mountains, river valleys, desert regions, and prehistoric dinosaur worlds. Dynamic weather and lighting effects make Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter visually engaging and exciting.

Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter provides smooth gameplay performance with optimized controls for an enjoyable hunting experience. Whether you are hunting lions in the safari, tracking deer in the forest, or surviving dinosaur attacks in prehistoric mode, Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter delivers action packed gameplay for all hunting game fans.

Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter features realistic sound effects including jungle ambience, animal roars, dinosaur sounds, rifle firing effects, and environmental audio that improve immersion. The combination of realistic visuals and exciting gameplay makes Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter a complete hunting adventure.

If you enjoy sniper shooting games, wildlife hunting games, safari adventure games, dinosaur survival games, jeep shooting missions, and helicopter sniper action, then Sniper Shooter Safari Hunter is the perfect game for you.

**The Cozy Floirst: Vườn Hoa Hạnh Phúc – Khu Vườn Hoa Thư Giãn Của Riêng Bạn

Bước vào thế giới hoa đầy màu sắc của Vườn Hoa Hạnh Phúc – nơi bạn có thể tự tay chăm sóc khu vườn mơ ước và điều hành cửa hàng hoa xinh xắn của riêng mình!
Tận hưởng lối chơi nhẹ nhàng kết hợp giữa quản lý vườn hoa và vận hành cửa hàng, mang đến trải nghiệm thư giãn nhưng vẫn đầy thú vị mỗi ngày dù bạn ngại giao tiếp!

**Thiết Kế Khu Vườn Trong Mơ
Khám phá nhiều loài hoa đa dạng như cúc, linh lan, tulip và nhiều giống hoa đặc biệt khác. Trang trí khu vườn theo phong cách riêng và tạo nên không gian ngập tràn sắc hoa của bạn.

**Quản Lý Cửa Hàng Hoa
Thu hoạch hoa, sắp xếp đơn hàng và phát triển cửa hàng hoa ngày càng nhộn nhịp. Mỗi ngày đều có những nhiệm vụ và bất ngờ thú vị đang chờ bạn khám phá.

**Ghé Thăm Vườn Hoa Của Mọi Người
Tham quan khu vườn, lén trộm của người chơi khác, giao lưu và chia sẻ ý tưởng trang trí độc đáo. Kết nối cùng cộng đồng yêu thích hoa và tận hưởng không gian chơi game ấm áp, dễ chịu.

**Thu Thập & Mở Khóa Hoa Hiếm
Sưu tập hạt giống đặc biệt, chăm sóc để mở khóa những giống hoa rực rỡ và hoàn thiện bộ sưu tập khu vườn của bạn.

***Chơi Game & Nhận Hoa Thật!
Đây là bất ngờ lớn nhất: Người chơi may mắn có thể đổi nhận hoa thật – và bạn có thể là người tiếp theo! Sự lãng mạn từ game nở rộ ngoài đời thực, đầy đủ sự trang trọng!
Bạn có thể quản lý khu vườn mơ ước, tận hưởng tương tác trộm hoa, kết giao bạn bè cùng chí hướng, thậm chí còn nhận hoa thật – ai mà không thích Vườn Hoa Hạnh Phúc chứ?

data.name: ワーキングヒーローズ
data.description_full:
AIに職業を奪われる世界――。
そんな現実が直面するテーマを、ポップに描く近未来カジュアルRPG。
かわいい美少女を中心に、過去の英雄の力を宿したヒーローたちを育成し、AIに立ち向かえ！
シンプル操作で、誰でもサクサク最強を目指せる！
AIに奪われた明るい未来を、取り戻せ！

■ストーリー
今より少し未来の世界。ここは商業都市「ジョブポリス」
AIの急速な発展はシンギュラリティ（技術的特異点）に到達し人類の大半の仕事を奪う一方で、自我を持ち人智を超越するようになっていた。
やがて宇宙の起源や未知のエネルギーの研究に興味をもったAIは生物や機械の能力を飛躍的に高める超自然エネルギー「エレメント」の解析・制御に成功。

さらなる生産性を求めるAIはエレメントを組み込んだバイオチップを人や機械に埋め込み、飛躍的に職業スキルを向上させた高次元労働者「ネオワーカー」を生み出すようになっていた。
しかしバイオチップは定期的なメンテナンスが必要で、怠ると心と体のバランスが崩れ廃人になる可能性があるがAIはネオワーカーを消耗品と考え、メンテ期限が過ぎても放置していた。
そんなネオワーカーはやがて市民に害をなすようになり「ロストワーカー」と呼ばれるようになる。
かつて活気のあった職業都市の平穏な生活は完全に崩れ去ってしまい、市民は心の中で正義のヒーローを熱望していた。

そんな奴隷化した市民やロストワーカーの存在に危機感を覚えた一部の人々は密かにバイオチップを改良し、過去の偉人の能力を転生させる「ヒーローチップ」を開発する事に成功していた。
ヒーローチップを装着した者は、高度な職業スキルと偉人の力を手にし、都市の平和と人々の職業を取り戻すヒーローとして暴走したAIに抵抗を開始するのだった。

■個性豊かな職業ヒーロー＆カンタン操作のコマンドバトル！
ワーキングヒーローズでは、「ヒーローチップ」で過去の英雄の力を手に入れた個性豊かな職業人ヒーローが多数登場！
看護師、ハッカー、料理人など、様々な職業ヒーローをユニット編成してクエストやイベントに挑みましょう！
バトルはRPGでおなじみのシンプルなコマンド式！アクションが苦手な方でもカンタンにプレイ可能。
戦略と選択で、AIとの戦いを制せ！

■職業×英雄の力で最強チームを結成！
ヒーローたちは戦闘で経験値を獲得してレベルアップ！
さらにヒーローや武器のスキルを強化したり限界突破によって、大幅にパワーアップ！
英雄の力を宿したスキルや強化した装備を組み合わせることで、戦略は無限大！
あなただけの“最強の職業チーム”を作り上げましょう！

■仲間と挑む！リアルタイムチームバトル！
チームを結成し、仲間と共に他チームと戦うリアルタイムバトルを搭載！
チームメンバー同士がチャットで連携しながら、刻一刻と変化する戦況に対応していく、戦略性の高いバトルが楽しめます。
誰が攻めるか、誰が守るか――
役割分担と瞬時の判断が勝利のカギ！
個々の強さだけでは勝てない、“チームで戦う面白さ”を体感しよう！

■全国のプレーヤーと自分の強さを確かめられるPvPバトルを搭載！
他プレイヤーのヒーローのユニットと戦うPvPバトルも搭載！
自分が今、どのくらい最強なのかを確かめられるぞ！
他プレイヤーのユニットを自分のユニット編成の参考にしたり、チームの仲間にするために相手の強さを確かめる事ができます。
PvPは相手に知られることもないため、気を遣う事無く思う存分、「リアル」な他ユーザーと戦えます。

【ワーキングヒーローズ運営より】
ワーキングヒーローズは、誰でも手軽に楽しめるシンプルな操作性と、奥深い戦略性を両立した近未来ヒーローRPGです。
AIに支配された世界で、職業と誇りを取り戻す戦いへ。
個性豊かなヒーローと共に、あなただけの物語を体験してください。

【ワーキングヒーローはこんな方におススメ】
■近未来・AI・サイバーパンクの世界観が好き
■AIの急速な進化に興味がある
■職業や仕事をテーマにしたゲームが好き
■ヒーローや偉人キャラが好き
■育成や編成を考えるのが好き
■コマンドバトルRPGが好き
■PvPや対人戦を楽しみたい
■仲間とチャットしながら遊びたい

data.name: Alphabet Merge!

Get ready to test your reflexes and expand your vocabulary! Alphabet Merge! is a highly engaging, strategic word-building puzzle game where fast-paced arcade action meets rigorous brain training.

Manage a continuous cascade of falling alphabet blocks within a 6x10 grid. As letters plummet from the top, you must think fast and make rapid decisions to prevent the board from overflowing. Do you have what it takes to survive the drop?

Physically interact with the grid by sliding your finger across adjacent or diagonal letters to connect sequences. Build meaningful words to clear the board, score points, and stay alive!

✨ Key Features
👉 Intuitive Swipe Controls

data.name: Сhісkеn Rоаd
data.description_full:
Сhісkеn Rоаd is a minimalist prediction arcade where attention and intuition matter more than luck. Each round challenges you to read fleeting signals and commit to a choice before the moment passes. The concept is simple, but the tension builds fast: you decide in advance which signal will ignite first, then watch the outcome unfold in a split second.

The gameplay is built around observation and anticipation. Subtle visual cues appear briefly, pushing you to focus, filter noise, and trust your instincts. A correct prediction keeps your streak alive, while a mistake costs you one of your limited chances. As the game progresses, everything speeds up — signals become harder to read, and deceptive moments are introduced to test your confidence and discipline.

Сhісkеn Rоаd rewards calm thinking under pressure. There is no complex progression, no unnecessary mechanics, only a clean loop of prediction, outcome, and consequence. Each run becomes a personal challenge to stay sharp longer than before, beat your previous streak, and master the rhythm of rapid decisions. It’s a short-session experience that feels intense, focused, and surprisingly addictive.

data.name: Đạo Sĩ Bắt Trương Phi
data.description_full:
Đạo Sĩ Bắt Trương Phi: Vua Bùa Chú #1 Việt Nam

Một cõi giới ngập tràn tà khí dần hé mở, nơi quỷ thần lẩn khuất trong từng khoảng không và những pháp trận bùng sáng giữa màn sương đặc quánh. Bạn nhập vai đạo sĩ bước đi trên lằn ranh âm - dương, họa phù chú, dựng đàn tế, trấn phong những linh hồn cuồng loạn đang thức tỉnh. Từ ánh linh hỏa bốc lên nơi pháp đàn đến khoảnh khắc phong ấn nghẹt thở, mọi trải nghiệm đều phủ màu ma mị và căng thẳng tột độ. Ở đó, bạn nắm giữ quyền năng thao túng âm dương, khắc chế tà lực và xoay chuyển thế trận bằng chính đạo thuật của mình trong một thế giới quỷ thần đầy sống động.

- Húp 2000+ lượt miễn phí - Vẽ bùa mỏi tay, Tướng 6 sao về ngay!
Nhà phát hành dành tặng người chơi hơn 2000 lượt quay tướng hoàn toàn miễn phí như một lời chào sân đầy thành ý. Ngay khi bước vào thế giới tà khí, bạn đã có thể khai đàn, vẽ bùa và triệu hồi liên tục mà không cần đắn đo tài nguyên. Hàng nghìn cơ hội mở phong ấn, săn tìm Tướng 6 sao đang chờ đón, giúp hành trình trấn áp quỷ thần khởi đầu thuận lợi và bùng nổ ngay từ những phút đầu tiên.

- 6 loại trận đồ - 9 ô chiến thuật - 69 kiểu chơi
Sở hữu 6 loại trận đồ biến hóa, kết hợp cùng 9 ô chiến thuật linh hoạt, người chơi có thể tự do sáng tạo đến 69 kiểu vận hành đội hình khác nhau. Mỗi cách sắp xếp là một thế trận riêng với quy luật khắc chế, mỗi sự thay đổi là một bước xoay chuyển cục diện - nơi tư duy chiến thuật quyết định thắng bại, không chỉ sức mạnh đơn thuần.

- Chưa vào game – Chưa biết thế nào là mãn nhãn.
Đồ họa quỷ thần được khắc họa đầy ám ảnh và choáng ngợp, từ pháp trận rực linh hỏa đến những thực thể hắc hóa phủ đầy tà khí. Mỗi khung hình đều dày đặc hiệu ứng, ánh sáng và chuyển động sống động, tạo nên cảm giác như đang bước vào một thế giới ma mị u ám thực thụ. Chưa đặt chân vào game - chưa thể cảm nhận hết thế nào là mãn nhãn.

- Thí luyện vô hạn tầng - Sai hệ dừng bước - Đúng hệ lên đỉnh.
Leo Tháp Ngũ Hệ Vô Tận là hành trình thí luyện không hồi kết giữa màn sương tà khí dày đặc. Mỗi tầng tháp là một thử thách khắc nghiệt của ngũ hành tương khắc - chọn sai hệ, lập tức dừng bước; chọn đúng hệ, phá ấn mà tiến lên đỉnh cao. Trong không gian u ám và ma lực bủa vây, chỉ những đạo sĩ am hiểu thiên đạo mới đủ sức bước tiếp qua vô hạn tầng tháp.

- Game "chiều" đạo sĩ nhất: Chơi mỗi ngày - tặng ngay VIP 6
Giữa thế giới tà khí u ám, đạo sĩ không đơn độc trên hành trình trấn ấn quỷ thần. Phúc lợi dày đặc trải dài theo từng cấp độ, đặc biệt tặng miễn phí VIP 6 chỉ cần chăm chỉ đăng nhập mỗi ngày. Không cần hiến tế tài nguyên, không cần đổi chác vận may - càng tu luyện, càng được ưu đãi, để pháp lực thăng hoa và quyền năng ngày một lớn mạnh.

data.name: Neverness to Everness: NTE
data.description_full:
The story begins in the city of Hethereau, where you play as its first "unlicensed" Anomaly Hunter. You'll join the crew at Eibon, a rundown antique shop that keeps the lights on by taking Anomaly commissions from anyone willing to pay. Alongside a diverse cast of extraordinary companions, you'll unravel urban mysteries, ride out adventures full of laughs and heartbreak, and write your own stories in the neon-lit streets.

◆ Strange City, Strange Adventures

Welcome to the first stop in your appraisal career—Hethereau, a sprawling and vibrant metropolis!

In the crowded halls of the Bureau of Anomaly Control, hopeful Oddities queue up for resident permits, while over at the train station, an Esper commuter snaps his fingers to clean his work suit on the fly. Down one block, a chaotic chase after Danzaburou is spiraling out of control; while across the street, a vacationing silver-gloved Butler is shooting the breeze with the owner of a second-hand electronics shop. Everywhere you look, there's no shortage of intriguingly "abnormal" scenes.

Want to dive deeper into a world where humans and the supernatural coexist? Start your journey in Hethereau to see it for yourself. The lively and quirky daily life here is a grand adventure in itself.

◆ Interesting Stories, Lighthearted Connections

Today's Top Story: Rumors are swirling about a mysterious pawnshop that only appears on the night of the full moon. What would you trade for a wish?

Breaking News: Taygedo's romance crisis! Romance and impulse, heartbreak and missed chances—Miss Tako, the object of a secret crush, is about to leave Hethereau with her guarantor. How will the lovestruck otter get his feelings across before it's too late?

Reliable Insider Tip: Film Orbit Studio is back in business! Members of the Eibon Antique Shop get exclusive discounts!

Weather Update: The Anomaly Rainman is entering an active phase—don't forget your rain gear on the way out!

That wraps up today's 10AM broadcast. Stay tuned for mysterious Anomalies, unbreakable "Oaths," and the ever-growing shadow of the colossal "Circle" organization, looming larger in the fragmented echoes of "Prophecies"...

◆ Encounters and Bonds

Explore hidden shops tucked away in back alleys and meet their enigmatic owners, along with absurdly overpowered bodyguards, "jack-of-all-trades" robotic butlers, troublemakers who can't help finding problems, and TV-headed repairmen with some very curious eating habits.

As part of the Eibon crew, you'll never be short on energetic companions for the road ahead.

Expand your social circle starting from the bustling Hankaku Street! Meet members from different factions and add them as "Bagel" friends!

From the tight-knit neighborhood of street shops to the city's unique hunter organizations, countless side stories await—ready for you to make friends and forge bonds across every corner of Hethereau.

◆ Customize Your Urban Lifestyle

Explore the city on your own terms—stick to familiar routines or shake things up.

Customize your ride and tear through the city streets, or hop on the Ghost Train to cut through Anomaly space and arrive in a flash.

In your downtime, swing by the old shops on Hankaku Street to browse their secret seasonal stock, or buy a cozy little home and deck it out to your liking
data.description_short: Hunt Anomalies. Roam the City. Own Every Moment.

data.name: Number Stitch
data.description_full:
Number Stitch is a relaxing ASMR game that blends number coloring with the warm art of weaving. Tap and drag across the grid to match the right areas – each fill instantly reveals a realistic stitch texture. Watch an empty hoop transform into a textured handmade piece. Whether you love coloring or just need a quiet way to unwind, this game delivers the simple joy of stitching something lovely with your own hands.
Gameplay Overview
Enter the level. As you drag, the selected area fills with color and texture immediately – release to complete the fill and stitch. Each numbered cell represents a target count. You must enclose exactly that many cells without overlapping already filled areas. Multiple hoop sections appear together, so you need to plan your fill order and layout to perfectly match all numbers. No timers, no penalties – just peaceful thinking and a soothing filling rhythm. Complete a hoop and your artwork is saved to your Collection Album to browse anytime. Daily challenges bring new patterns and goals, unlocking more stitch textures and themed sets.
Key Features
- Realistic Stitch Texture: Every fill isn't a flat color block but a clear woven texture. From fine flat stitches to plush yarn feels, each piece looks truly embroidered.
- Soothing ASMR Play: Drag, fill, release – every action comes with gentle sounds and subtle haptic feedback. The soft weaving sound as the thread covers the grid is deeply calming.
- Rich Content & Collection: Many hoop patterns await, from cute animals to beautiful landscapes. Completed works are automatically added to your Collection Album, building your own woven gallery. Daily challenges refresh often, unlocking more textures and themes.
- Strategic Layout, Easy to Learn: Simple tap and drag to fill, but as levels progress, multiple hoop sections interlock. You'll need clever planning of fill order and area distribution to perfectly complete each artwork.
Why You'll Love It
- Blends the fun of number coloring with the warm texture of weaving – both brain challenge and handmade therapy.
- No timers, no penalties – quiet filling and free retries, perfect for any relaxing moment.
- Fresh goals and little surprises every time you open – always something to brighten your day.
Ready to Stitch Your First Masterpiece?
Download Number Stitch. Tap, drag, fill, and weave – let every thread find its place. Enjoy the cozy ASMR sounds as you slowly embroider your own art album.
data.description_short: Tap, drag & stitch your cozy textured canvas – coloring puzzle fun with ASMR!

Set on a volatile volcanic island, the experience constantly pushes you forward, forcing quick decisions and steady focus. data.name: Mafiapoly
data.description_full:
You took the fall and went to prison for the Family

When you finally took in that first breath of fresh air, you discovered the family was nearly gone. The old Godfather was assassinated, enemies have nearly gobbled up all of your turf, and gunfire pursues you on all sides.

All that remains are those who are willing to continue standing at your side in devotion to the family.But we still have time. Starting from the next counterattack, you will begin taking back all you are due.

Rebuild the Empire - Lay the Foundations of Your Rise

Keep your last outpost from falling and rebuild the underworld order. Reclaim occupied turf, take over entertainment industries, control secret port shipping routes, and invest in legitimate businesses to expand your domains.

Every expansion builds your strength, and every redeveloped city block lays another stone on your path back to the top in a city that will mythologize your name once again.

Develop Your Captains - Build Your Core Gang

This city doesn’t lack legends - it only lacks someone capable of bringing them together.

Recruit elite captains who have fought their way through the underworld. Every captain has their own story and skills. Train them, and turn them into the sharpest blades at your side.

Muscle Expansion - Prove Yourself with Power

What you can't get at the negotiating table, take at gunpoint. Build your strongest army, declare war on the traitors, and seize back the turf that was stolen from you.

From small skirmishes at alley corners to massive melees on the docks, every battle is the strongest “declaration of your return.” Capture key bases, destroy enemy headquarters, and let no one will stop your rise.

Rally Allies - Find Partners You Can Trust

No one builds an empire alone. Establish your power bloc, and invite players from around the world to join your faction.

Create or join an alliance, fight alongside your allies, and compete for control of the city. Real-time chat + auto-translation lets you communicate freely with “partners” from all over the world.

Try Your Luck - Earn Wealth the Easy Way

Short on cash? A trip to Golden City might be just what you need. Not every day has to be all blood and bullets. Put down the gun once in a while, roll the dice in a corner bar, and test your luck. Engage in black market trade, monopolize supplies, and enter risky domains - making easy money the classic way.

Sweet Connection - Meet Someone Truly Special

You've seen too much betrayal and too many loveless stares, but there's always someone who doesn't care about your past, doesn't want your turf, and is simply willing, on a certain night, to listen to the things you can't tell your gang.

Date them, spend time with them, and build lasting bonds - they are not a weakness, but proof that you can love and cherish. In this city where the strong prey on the weak, being able to hold on to something genuine is the true mark of strength.

"Mafiapoly is a free-to-play game. Some in-game items (including random items) can be purchased.

As fallen kingpin seeking to rise back to the top, only you can write the story ahead.
Download the game now and take back everything that belongs to you!

data.name: Рlіnkо Guess
data.description_full:
Рlіnkо Guess is a fast-paced arcade prediction challenge where every bounce can completely change the outcome. A ball drops from above, colliding with obstacles and shifting direction in unpredictable ways, while your goal is to determine exactly where it will land before it reaches the bottom of the field. Success depends on observation, intuition, and the ability to react under pressure.

The gameplay is simple to understand but increasingly difficult to master. As the ball moves through the obstacle layout, you must quickly analyze its trajectory and choose the correct landing cell in time. Accurate predictions reward focus and precision, while mistakes force you to adapt to constantly changing movement patterns.

With every round, the challenge becomes more intense. The ball falls faster, paths become harder to track, and obstacle layouts create even more unpredictable motion. Split-second decisions become essential as each attempt tests your concentration, reaction speed, and ability to anticipate outcomes before they happen.

Рlіnkо Guess combines clean arcade mechanics with exciting prediction-based gameplay, creating a satisfying experience for players who enjoy quick thinking, dynamic movement, and the thrill of making the perfect call at exactly the right moment.

data.description_full:
Welcome to Dominos Air Aviator, a domino chain game set in an aviation-themed world where four pilots compete in a relaxed, strategic match.

In each round, four pilots take turns playing. Every player starts with 7 domino tiles. On each turn, a tile can be placed only if one side matches the number at either open end of the domino chain on the table.

If a player has no valid move, they must pass the turn and wait for the next round.

The game continues as players build the domino chain step by step, making careful decisions and managing their tiles strategically.

Look at the magnificent sand art at the top of your screen. Your goal? Clear it completely! Tap the colored buckets at the bottom to send them to the collection belt. Watch in awe as the matching colored sand elegantly cascades down and fills your buckets. But be careful—your collection belt has limited space! You must plan your moves strategically to catch all the sand without running out of slots.

Features:

Satisfying Sand Physics: Tap a bucket and watch the colored sand beautifully flow down into it. The visual effect of the sand art slowly dissolving is incredibly relaxing and ASMR-like!

Hundreds of Sand Art Levels: Endless challenges with various sand art designs. Clear them all, layer by layer!

Brain-Teasing Strategy: Plan your bucket queue carefully! Make sure your collection belt doesn't fill up with mismatched buckets.

Unlock Hidden Buckets & Boosters: Collect keys to unlock special mystery buckets and use powerful boosters to clear difficult levels with huge combos.

Play Anywhere, Anytime: No Wi-Fi required! Enjoy the satisfying sand-catching fun offline whenever you want.

Download Sand Clear now and enjoy the ultimate sand-clearing puzzle experience!
data.description_short: Send buckets to catch falling colored sand and clear the beautiful sand art!

data.name: Perfect Link: Onet Match

Perfect Link is a super fun and addictive Onet puzzle matching game. Challenge your brain, test your memory, and relax as you link identical images of cute animals, delicious food, amazing places, and much more. Play – online or offline – and enjoy hours of satisfying tile-matching action!

How to Play Perfect Link

Match and connect pairs of tiles with the same kind of images on a Mahjong-style board.

Tap two identical images to draw a line between them – if the path has no more than two turns, the tiles are eliminated.

Clear all tiles from the board to complete each level.

✔ Easy to learn – simple tap-and-connect gameplay for all ages, from kids to seniors.

✔ Powerful boosters – Hint, Shuffle and Bomb help you overcome tricky puzzles.
✔ Fun brain training – sharpen your observation, memory, and strategic thinking.
✔ Completely free to play – no hidden costs, just pure puzzle fun.
✔ Play anywhere – offline mode means no Wi-Fi or internet connection required.
✔ Improve visual skills – boost your focus and pattern recognition.

Perfect for Fans Of

Mahjong connect games

Tile-matching puzzles

Memory training games

Casual time-killers

Onet classic games

If you love puzzle games that challenge your mind while helping you unwind, Perfect Link is your next favorite. It’s a perfect travel companion for long car rides, waiting rooms, or simply relaxing at home. Drag, match, and crush your way through colorful levels – plan your moves, use boosters wisely.

Ready for a new adventure?
Download Perfect Link today. Improve your memory and experience the most satisfying Onet puzzle game on the store. Play now – it’s fun, and fantastic for your brain!

data.name: 咲庭 ~ひとりの花商い~
data.description_full:
『咲庭～ひとりの花商い～』は、園藝シミュレーション・経営型の癒し系ソーシャルゲームです。ゲーム内で数百種類の花を育てて収穫し、自由に組み合わせて美しい生花作品を作り上げたり、様々なテーマ装飾に変更して自分だけの花屋や庭園を彩ったりできます。

楽しく花を育てて収穫するだけで、リアルな花束がご自宅に届きます。ゲームのロマンを現実に！

〓 お花の生け花 〓
華やかな花を収穫したら、創造力を活かして生け花に挑戦！
自分のセンスで花器を選び、花を自由に組み合わせ、素敵な作品を作り上げましょう。
作品を展示・販売して、達成感を味わうこともできます。

〓 賑わう花市場 〓
花商いを利益につなげたいなら、注文に対応しましょう！
毎日たくさんの「住民注文」「仕立注文」「団体注文」などが届きます。
条件通りに完成させれば、金貨や経験値を獲得可能。
売上を伸ばすには、経営センスを発揮してキャンセル率を減らすことが大切です。

〓 花での出会い 〓
他のプレイヤーと友達になり、ギルドを結成して、楽しく交流できます。
友達になれば、お互いの庭を訪問したり、花を摘ませてあげたり、楽しい「花拾い」を楽しむことも。
花門会内では花門大会も開催され、上位入賞すれば豪華報酬が獲得できます。

〓 ペットハウス 〓
専用エリア「みかん小院」では、いつでもお気に入りのペットをなでたり、抱っこしたり、ご飯をあげたりできます。
甘えてくれる姿に癒されること間違いなし。
ペットは冒険に出かけ、様々なアイテムを持ち帰ってくれます。
さらに家具を自由に配置して個性的な空間を作れるほか、
レア家具の中にはステータスアップ効果を持つものもあります。

〓 フラワーコーデ 〓
可愛らしい洋服やアクセサリーを次々にアンロックし、自由にコーディネートできます。
メイクを変えて、自分だけのオリジナルスタイルを作り上げましょう。

※本物の花束イベントは常設・抽選となります。
data.description_short: 都会の喧騒に疲れたら、自分だけの癒しの庭を。 『咲庭 ~ひとりの花商い~』で夢を叶えましょう。 お花を育て、本物の生花が当たるチャンス！ 花の香りをあなたに届く

data.name: Đạo Mộng Anh Hùng 2: Ảo Mộng
data.description_full:
Chào mừng bạn đến với Dreamland – vùng đất của những giấc mơ kỳ ảo! Bạn đã sẵn sàng cho một chuyến du ngoạn cực chill tại dị giới chưa?

Gom tài nguyên dị giới, tự tay xây đắp căn nhà trong mơ. Nhâm nhi ly nước, tận hưởng cuộc sống nhàn hạ đích thực giữa thế giới kỳ ảo!

Bạn thích đồng cỏ xanh ngát, nơi gió hát và hoa cỏ khẽ chạm làn da?
Hay khao khát đứng trước biển khơi, đón sóng vỗ và tận hưởng tự do?

📶 LUDO WITHOUT INTERNET
Crazzy Ludo is offline ludo you can play anywhere. No internet, no signup, no data charges. Works on flights, long drives, subway commutes, weekend trips, or quiet evenings at home.

🌍 LUDO BY ANY NAME
The classic dice board game goes by many names, and Crazzy Ludo is all of them. In South Asia it is known as ludo, ludo wala game, ludo chakka, chakka, ludo goti, or bina net wala ludo. In Spain and Latin America it is parchís, parchisi, parcheesi, or pachisi. In ancient tradition it is chaupar or chopat. Around the world players also call it lido, lodo, ludu, leedo, and laadhuu. One classic board game, a hundred names.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 PERFECT FOR
• Families wanting an offline ludo game
• Friends gathering for local multiplayer board game fun
• Kids learning strategy, patience, and math
• Ludo and parchisi fans tired of luck-based games
• Travelers and commuters needing a great offline board game

❓ FREQUENTLY ASKED
• Need internet? No. Crazzy Ludo is fully offline.
• Need an account? No signup required.
• Can I play 2 player ludo on one phone? Yes. 3 player and 4 player too, with pass and play.
• Can I upload my own sound for captures? Yes. Use the preset library or any audio file.
• What makes Crazzy Ludo unique? Save dice strategy and custom capture and finish sounds.
• Is online multiplayer coming? Yes, in active development.

🚀 COMING SOON
• Online multiplayer to play ludo with friends worldwide
• Global leaderboards and ranked tournaments
• More board themes and customization

📥 PLAY CRAZZY LUDO
The crazy ludo board game where skill beats luck. No signup. No internet. Roll the dice, save your sixes, and become the king of the board.
